case_title: RODRIGUEZ ARTURO VS TRAVEL CENTER EXPRESS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $985.00 FILED BY RODRIGUEZ ARTURO AS TO DEFENDANT TRAVEL CENTER EXPRESS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-26-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TRAVEL CENTER EXPRESS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ ARTURO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRAVEL CENTER EXPRESS $985.00 PRINCIPAL, $29.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,014.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO THIRD PARTY NOEL MANTO HEARING SET FOR JUN-01-1992 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 05
CIVIL SUBPENA SERVED ON NOEL MANTO ON 5-8-92.
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF JUN-01-1992, DISCHARGED AS TO THIRD PARTY NOEL MANTO
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT TRAVEL CENTER EXPRESS
